description_long: This is a vertical parking sign mounted on a slender black pole, commonly found in urban parking lots or along streets. The sign at the top is rectangular with a green and white color scheme, displaying the text '1 HOUR PARKING' and 'CUSTOMER PARKING ONLY' in bold, legible letters. The sign is made of metal, likely aluminum, with a reflective coating for visibility in low light. The pole is a single, straight, cylindrical rod, likely made of steel or another durable metal, painted black for weather resistance. The back of the sign is plain and unmarked, with the mounting hardware not visible from the front. This object is designed to provide clear parking instructions and designate reserved parking spaces for customers.
description: A green and white metal parking sign on a tall black pole, indicating '1 HOUR PARKING' and 'CUSTOMER PARKING ONLY'. The sign is reflective and mounted for visibility in urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full parking sign with all text clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view showing the thin profile of the sign and pole, with the sign barely visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain back of the sign and the supporting pole.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile of the sign and pole.
